name: shared-contacts
description: Self-hostable CardDAV server for managing shared contacts with a modern web-based management interface

scripts.lint: npm --prefix ui run lint && npm --prefix sync-service run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix ui run lint -- --fix && npm --prefix sync-service run lint -- --fix
scripts.test: npm --prefix sync-service run test && npm --prefix ui run test
scripts.test:unit: npm --prefix sync-service run test:unit && npm --prefix ui run test:unit

author: Shawn Hoffman
